title: Test Refactor tui/app.py to reduce complexity

handoff_summary.completed: Ran test_tui_actions.py (29 tests pass), test_tui_app.py (62 tests pass, including TuiSchedulerReporterDeferredTests), test_tui_render.py, test_tui_state.py, test_tui_tree.py (152 tests pass). Verified all public API imports are accessible from agent_takt.tui and sub-modules as documented. Total: 243 targeted tests, all green.
handoff_summary.risks: None identified. The BINDINGS table staying inside OrchestratorTuiApp (class-level attribute) is working and tested. The mixin inheritance chain (OrchestratorTuiActionsMixin, App[None]) is exercised by all integration tests.
handoff_summary.next_action: Proceed to documentation or review bead.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: None — public API surface unchanged; all symbols remain accessible from agent_takt.tui namespace.
handoff_summary.design_decisions: OrchestratorTuiActionsMixin in actions.py correctly uses type:ignore[attr-defined] for all self.* calls that reference OrchestratorTuiApp internals, which is the appropriate pattern for a mixin that relies on the concrete class's attributes.
handoff_summary.test_coverage_notes: All 27 action methods in the mixin are exercised via existing test_tui_app.py integration tests. TuiSchedulerReporter import from agent_takt.tui confirmed. _detail_section_body and _detail_section_title accessible from agent_takt.tui. _live_status_bar_text importable from agent_takt.tui.app. build_tui_app returns a functioning OrchestratorTuiApp inheriting both mixin actions and App base class.
handoff_summary.known_limitations: BINDINGS table remains inside OrchestratorTuiApp (class-level attribute in build_tui_app) as documented — moving it to a separate file would break the lazy-import guard for textual. This is expected and acceptable.

conflict_risks: None — public API surface unchanged; all symbols remain accessible from agent_takt.tui namespace.

execution_history.summary: All targeted tests for the tui/app.py refactor pass. 243 tests passed.
